patternSource: The mod is restricted to specific hosts\.","error":"E_INVALID_MOD_HOST
message: You have a restricted mod on your server. Please review your mods and remove the restrictions in order for your server to list!
Please review your Discord link; it should only be the code, not the whole link!
Please check your RCON password as it needs to be at least 8 characters long, the longer the better!

patternSource: Failed to Authenticate\. Please make sure you are using valid authentication token or username / password that owns the game\.
message: Failed to Authenticate. Please make sure you are using a valid authentication token. Please go make a new one
